# CircleDashed

## Tags
pending, dot, progress, issue, draft, code, coding, version control

## Categories
development, shapes

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/circle-dashed)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::CircleDashed;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        CircleDashed { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
